segments.text: At the start is a dream For the dreamer it's easy But it's more than it seems For our wishes o'er the sky adorn Inspire the night and stars are born

Through the years it'll grow From the roots to the branches Little star you will glow As you reach beyond the sky and sea Inspiring other dreams to be Take a step, take my hand Who knows where we'll land
And close your eyes Just count to three And come real

Find your wish, that's the start Turn your eyes up to the stars It's a treasure trove of dreamers to discover Then find the place in your dream where a spark becomes a gleam Shine your light, you've gotta share it with each other
And share it, child, cause you give us the world. For the light of who you are. Touches dreamers near and far. That's when our wish. That's when our wish. Yeah, that's when our wish. Becomes a star.

That's a start, turn your eyes unto the stars It's a treasure trove of dreamers to discover And find the place in your dream where that spark becomes a gleam Shine your light, you're gonna share it with each other

Let your star shine unfurled And share it, child, cause you give us the world For the light of who you are Touches dreamers near and far That's when I will That's when I will That's when I will Becomes a star
Share your light. Share your light and shine.
